compiled_state.title: RED: Create tests for emit-review-event.sh
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create tests/scripts/test-emit-review-event.sh with tests that call emit-review-event.sh (which does not exist yet). Tests should FAIL (RED).

Uses real git worktree fixtures per test-ticket-lib.sh pattern (integration surface covered — no separate integration test needed).

Test functions:
- test_emit_writes_valid_jsonl: Call emit-review-event.sh with review_result payload, parse with python3 json.loads, assert valid JSON line
- test_emit_unique_filenames: Call twice, assert different filenames in .review-events/
- test_emit_graceful_failure_missing_tracker: Fresh temp repo WITHOUT ticket init, assert non-zero exit + stderr message
- test_emit_rejects_invalid_type: Call with event_type "bad_type", assert non-zero exit
- test_emit_schema_version_present: Verify written event contains schema_version=1 field
- test_emit_graceful_failure_lock_exhaustion: Hold .ticket-write.lock externally with flock, call emit-review-event.sh with short timeout, assert non-zero exit + stderr (no hang, no crash)

## TDD Requirement

RED — emit-review-event.sh does not exist yet. All 6 tests should fail.

## Test Approach

Create fixture .tickets-tracker/ worktree with .review-events/ directory. Call emit-review-event.sh with valid review_result event payload. Parse written file with python3 -c "import json; json.loads(line)". For missing-tracker test, use fresh temp repo WITHOUT ticket init. For lock-exhaustion test, acquire lock externally.

## Files to Modify
- tests/scripts/test-emit-review-event.sh (create)

## File Impact
- Source: plugins/dso/scripts/emit-review-event.sh
- Test: tests/scripts/test-emit-review-event.sh
- Fuzzy match: emitrevieweventsh ⊂ testemitrevieweventsh ✓ (no .test-index entry needed)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file syntactically valid
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-emit-review-event.sh
- [ ] 6+ test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_emit" tests/scripts/test-emit-review-event.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
